originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__gdp_695` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&gdp` is never used.
reasoning: gdp is assigned at L7 (gdp = "group_desc") and IS read at L10 ((*gdp)++ inside for loop). The dead store alarm is a false positive — gdp is definitely used after assignment. PC = __need___FILE AND EXT2FS_ENABLE_SWAPFS: __need___FILE=T is a restrictive library macro (defined only transiently during stdio.h internal header processing), confirming this is a desugaring artifact.
